title: Alibaba's Qwen models arrive (and they're free)
summary:
Alibaba's Qwen models hit the text and vision endpoints for free, and the community showcase gets a new text-to-image app.

We wired up Alibaba's Qwen models to the text and vision endpoints. You now have access to qwen-coder-large for development, qwen-large with a massive 1M context window, and qwen-vision for image analysis. We also immediately dropped the paywall on qwen-large and qwen-vision, making them fully accessible on the free tier.

The community showcase keeps expanding. LND Ai, a new text-to-image generation tool built on the API, was just added to the garden.
